_comment: Inputs are resolved relative to this file's directory. Twilio's two OpenAPI specs are already namespace-disjoint (MessagingV1* vs Api20100401* tags; messaging.v1.* vs api.v2010.* schemas; disjoint path prefixes), so no prefix transforms are needed. The serverOverride per input is essential, though — without it the merged spec carries two top-level hosts and operations would silently inherit the wrong one.
